_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: IT service reporting involves analysing data to understand how an IT product or service has performed against the Key Performance Indicators (KPIs).
reference_document_element_description: Build and maintain self-service reports and dashboards that enable business stakeholders to monitor KPIs and explore data without analyst intervention.
comments: DDaT skill equal WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-007 (OP, cosine: 0.524), DA-K-010 (DA, cosine: 0.493).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.495). Shared vocabulary: [data, kpis, service]. DDaT-only terms [against, analysing, indicators, involves, key, performance] vs WIDAI-only terms [analyst, build, business, dashboards, enable, explore] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.860 (P=0.851, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DDaT element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (78.8%). Despite 'Equal' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "IT service reporting involves analysing data to understand how an IT product or" and "Build and maintain self-service reports and dashboards that enable business stak". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.658 > STS 0.495 (gap +0.163). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, kpis, service] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.4%. Shared tokens: [data, kpis, service]. DDaT-only: [against, analysing, indicators, involves, key, performance]. WIDAI-only: [analyst, build, business, dashboards, enable, explore].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 78.8% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
STS 0.495 barely clears classification threshold for Equal. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.163 with low STS 0.495. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
